Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class EACSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.EACSettings2
public class EACSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for EACSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EACSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AddRcCompToFlexiPages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AutoPopulateGoogleMeetLinks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AutomatedEmailFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActivityAnalyticsPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActivityCaptureEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActivityMetricsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActivitySyncEngineEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEacForEveryonePrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnforceEacSharingPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInboxActivitySharingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInsightsInTimelineEacStdEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInsightsInTimelineEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}EACSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProvisionProductivityFeatures" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesforceEventsOnlyPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SensitiveEmailFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SyncInternalEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
